reference: Hello. During intercourse, your foreskin got retracted and caused a tight ring at the corona, resulting in a fissure. This is called paraphimosis. Pull the foreskin and the skin ring to cover the glans, and this edema will resolve on its own. You will need a circumcision if you want to avoid recurrence.
